text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship seems to be looking for something in
the plaza.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Ugh, I should've known trying to capitalize on random bursts of energy at night was a bad idea...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I was going to send McQueen on a scavenger
hunt, so I spent the whole night hiding coupons
for a cake shop all over the place.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But halfway through, I realized I'd been hiding
stickerback Gold Ship photocards instead.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
These puppies are supposed to be presents for
my fans around the galaxy, so I can't just leave
them lying around for any old Joe to find, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've been toiling all night to pick them
all up.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you pitch in and help too! You're my trainer,
after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We manage to find all the photos, but Gold Ship
ends up exhausted after pulling an intense
all-nighter.
